bars._provenance: Pre-registered hypothesis bars — arch-finn-cost-of-play.md, set 2026-06-09 BEFORE any data existed (composition run cost-of-play-0609b). Written ONCE per flatline B6/HC5. The readout embeds this file's sha256; editing this file = a different run, never a corrected one.

h1_cost_split.claim: inference is a minor share of per-call cost
h1_cost_split.blended_note: blended is a function of the designed mix — mix-dependent, not regime-robust

h2_scale_behavior.claim: unit cost falls as volume amortizes infra

crossover.note: no reliable crossover (R² below bar or non-decreasing infra curve)

h3_cheval_seam.note: no bar pre-set — first measurement establishes the baseline

infra_reconciliation.note: unallocated infra is reported, never redistributed into per-call numbers (B8)
